name: American Express® Business Gold Card
title: American Express® Business Gold Card (American Express)
text:
Card: American Express® Business Gold Card (American Express)
BEST FOR BUSINESSES WHO WANT CUSTOMIZED REWARDS
Pros: Earn 4 Membership Rewards points per dollar spent in the top two spend categories each billing cycle (on the first $150,000 in combined purchases each calendar year, then 1 point per dollar spent thereafter),This card comes with a solid welcome offer,Up to $12.95 monthly Walmart+  statement credit (plus applicable taxes and fees; subject to auto renewal; plus ups not eligible; enrollment required),Monthly up to $20 flexible business statement credit (enrollment required)
Cons: $375 annual fee,There may be better options for small businesses who don't spend a lot
Why we chose it: If your business does a lot of spending, you can probably justify spending the $375 annual fee that’s associated with the American Express Business Gold card. This card allows you to earn points in the top two categories in which you spend the most each billing cycle. If you max out the categories each year, you could walk away with 600,000 Membership Rewards points annually.

Amex has several airline and hotel partners you can transfer points to and often offers limited-time transfer bonuses that you can take advantage of to increase the value of existing points. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: The American Express Business Gold card is great for larger businesses with higher overhead costs that want to maximize their Membership Rewards points in business-specific categories. Smaller businesses may have trouble racking up enough expenses to make this card worthwhile.
Annual fee: $375
Recommended credit: 670-850
Rewards: 1 - 4X points
Intro bonus: Earn 100,000 Membership Rewards® points after you spend $15,000 on eligible purchases with the Business Gold Card within the first 3 months of Card Membership.*
Points valuation: 2
APR: 17.74% - 28.49% Variable,29.99% Variable
Transfer partners: This card earns Amex points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/amex-business-gold-card-review/
